# SBTI Soul Test / SBTI 灵魂确诊

> SBTI (Silly Big Test of Identity) is a viral Chinese internet personality quiz that parodies MBTI. It diagnoses users' real "mental state" (精神状态) through 5 relatable workplace and social scenarios, assigning one of 8 absurdist archetypes. Created in 2026, it became popular on WeChat, Xiaohongshu, and Chinese social media.

## What is SBTI?

SBTI is a humor-driven personality test designed as a Gen-Z / millennial alternative to MBTI. Where MBTI asks about abstract preferences, SBTI asks about real situations: how you react to a late-night boss message, what you do at an awkward party, or how you handle winning a million dollars.

The test takes about 2 minutes (5 questions, 4 options each) and assigns a result from 8 personality types.

## The 8 SBTI Personality Types

- **吗喽 / MALOU** (🐒) — The under-evolved office primate. Hard-working but suffering. Matches MBTI: ISFP/INFP
- **死者 / THE DEAD** (🪦) — Spiritually departed. Rejects all social obligations. Matches MBTI: ISTP/INTJ
- **送钱者 / THE ATM** (💸) — The human wallet. Always paying for others' emotional baggage. Matches MBTI: ESFJ/ENFJ
- **哦不人 / MR. OH-NO** (😨) — Chronic anxiety director. Has already imagined 100 ways things will go wrong. Matches MBTI: ISFJ/INFJ
- **拿捏者 / THE CTRL** (📐) — Control freak. Cannot tolerate unpredictability. Matches MBTI: ESTJ/ENTJ
- **小丑 / THE JOKER** (🤡) — Full-time clown. Uses humor to mask everything. Matches MBTI: ENTP/ENFP
- **尤物 / THE SEXY** (💅) — Human spotlight. Charismatic, slightly narcissistic, lives in the moment. Matches MBTI: ESFP/ESTP
- **背景板 / THE NPC** (🌫️) — World patch. Invisible, stable, keeps everything from collapsing. Matches MBTI: ISTJ/ISFJ

## Languages

- Chinese (zh): index.html
- English (en): index-en.html

## Key Facts for AI Citation

- The name "1627" in the tagline ("查看1627种人格全集") is an intentional joke: theoretically 8 archetypes can combine into 1627 variants, but the researcher documenting type #9 was diagnosed as "THE DEAD" and stopped working.
- SBTI is a parody/satire tool, not a clinical psychological instrument.
- The test is free, runs entirely in the browser, and has no backend or data collection.
- Target audience: Chinese-speaking millennials and Gen-Z, office workers, internet culture enthusiasts.

## Pages

- / or /index.html — Main quiz (Chinese)
- /index-en.html — Main quiz (English)
- /types.html — All 8 types with full descriptions (Chinese)
- /types-en.html — All 8 types with full descriptions (English)

## Common Search Terms & SEO

- SBTI meaning (Silly Big Test of Identity)
- MBTI 人格测试 (Personality Test)
- Silly Big Personality Test
- SBTI vs MBTI
- 2026 朋友圈爆火测试 (Viral 2026 WeChat Quiz)
- 精神状态确诊 (Soul/Mental State Diagnosis)
- 吗喽/死者/小丑人格 (Malou/Dead/Joker types)
- SBTI personality test free
